title: Delegation Brief Contract
description: Canonical JSON Schema for the delegation brief only. This contract intentionally excludes task-record, worker-result, approval, and runtime-gate fields.

operating_root.description: Single operating root for the delegated task.

project_context_reference.description: Ordered project-context references the worker should use.

source_spec_reference.description: Ordered source-spec references that define the task.

objective.description: One primary objective expressed as a single string.

files_in_scope.description: Ordered non-empty list of files that the worker may edit.

acceptance_criteria.description: Ordered observable acceptance criteria for the task.

validation_commands.description: Ordered non-empty list of validation commands for the task.

out_of_scope.description: Ordered explicit boundaries that must not be broadened.

local_evidence.description: Ordered local evidence paths or facts the worker should not rediscover.

task_boundary_rules.description: Ordered task boundary rules, including stop-on-scope-mismatch behavior.

required_return_format.description: Ordered return-format requirements. Content should reference canonical worker-result fields rather than ad hoc prose.

non_empty_string_array.$comment: JSON arrays are ordered by definition; minItems enforces non-empty ordered lists.
